nodes.label: Vityilló App Icon 512px – dark forest green rounded-square PWA/app icon featuring a cream/ivory silhouette scene of two deer (doe and stag facing each other) surrounded by pine trees with mountain peaks in the background; style is flat vector silhouette; palette: deep forest green background (#2d5a3d approx) with warm cream/ivory motif; conveys luxury nature/wilderness lodge brand identity
